---
title: "S4A Phase 1: pooling analysis"
author: "Tushar Garg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=F,message=F, warning=F)
suppressMessages(if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman"))
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,rio,janitor,here)
source(here::here("Scripts","0.functions.R"))
```

```{r import, include=F}
master <- readRDS(here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","master_clean.rds"))
```

```{r xpert recode}
# Recode xpert
master <- recode_xpert_pool_results(master,
                                    xpert_result_col = "Xpert_result",
                                    pool_result_col  = "pool_resultt",
                                    xpert_trace = c("as_pos"),
                                    pool_trace  = c("as_pos_xpert"))


# Fixing poolsize formatting
master <- master %>%
  mutate(poolsize = factor(poolsize, levels = c(2L, 3L, 4L))
         )

# Harmonized master df 
# Make it coherent with STARD by removing all invalid pools
# remove all pools with NA
# keeping only valid (pos,neg) results to achieve consistent denominator
masterH <- master %>%
  filter(!is.na(pooling)) %>%
   filter(
    xpert %in% c("pos", "neg"),
    pooling %in% c("pos", "neg"),
    culture %in% c("pos", "neg")
  )
```

```{r export short dataset}
master %>%
  select(Country_Name,case_finding,settingACF,culture,xpert,mtb_grade,pooling,poolsize,poolno,pool_xpert_result,pool_mtb_grade,ssm,hiv_status_short) %>% 
  export(.,here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","master_short.xlsx"))
```


```{r analysis population}
# Table for appendix
valid_vals <- c("pos", "neg")

count_analysis <- function(dat, vars, has_culture = FALSE) {
  dat %>%
    mutate(
      miss   = if_any(all_of(vars), is.na),
      contam = if (has_culture) (!miss & culture == "contaminated") else FALSE,
      incl   = (!miss & !contam & if_all(all_of(vars), ~ .x %in% valid_vals)),
      inv    = (!miss & !contam & !incl)
    ) %>%
    summarise(
      `Included in analysis`              = sum(incl, na.rm = TRUE),
      `Excluded: missing`                 = sum(miss, na.rm = TRUE),
      `Excluded: contaminated culture`    = sum(contam, na.rm = TRUE),
      `Excluded: invalid/error/noresult`  = sum(inv, na.rm = TRUE),
      Total                               = n()
    )
}

analysis_populations <- bind_rows(
  count_analysis(master, c("pooling","xpert","culture"), has_culture = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(Comparison = "Primary analysis: (Pooled testing, Individual Xpert Ultra) vs culture"),

  count_analysis(master, c("pooling","culture"), has_culture = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(Comparison = "Pooled testing vs culture"),

  count_analysis(master, c("xpert","culture"), has_culture = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(Comparison = "Individual Xpert Ultra vs culture"),

  count_analysis(master, c("pooling","xpert"), has_culture = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(Comparison = "Pooled testing vs Individual Xpert Ultra")
) %>%
  rename(`Excluded: invalid/error/noresult Xpert result` = `Excluded: invalid/error/noresult`) %>%
  select(
    Comparison,
    `Included in analysis`,
    `Excluded: missing`,
    `Excluded: contaminated culture`,
    `Excluded: invalid/error/noresult Xpert result`,
    Total
  )

analysis_populations

export(analysis_populations, here("Outputs","Performance","Appendix table","Appendix_analysis_pop.xlsx"))
```

```{r}
calculate_performance <- function(data,
                                  tests,
                                  reference_standards,
                                  grouping_vars = NULL,
                                  pos_label = "pos",
                                  neg_label = "neg",
                                  digits = 3,
                                  compact = FALSE) {
  
  ci_binom <- function(success, total) {
    if (is.na(success) || is.na(total) || total <= 0) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_))
    as.numeric(stats::binom.test(success, total, conf.level = 0.95)$conf.int)
  }
  
  compute_metrics_for_pair <- function(df, test, ref) {
    n_all <- nrow(df)
    n_used_df <- df %>%
      dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(test, ref))) %>%
      tidyr::drop_na()
    
    n_used <- nrow(n_used_df)
    n_excluded <- 0L
    
    if (n_used == 0) {
      return(tibble::tibble(
        test = test, reference = ref,
        tp = 0L, fp = 0L, tn = 0L, fn = 0L, total = 0L,
        sensitivity = NA_real_, sen_ciL = NA_real_, sen_ciH = NA_real_,
        specificity = NA_real_, spec_ciL = NA_real_, spec_ciH = NA_real_,
        prevalence  = NA_real_,
        ppv = NA_real_, ppv_ciL = NA_real_, ppv_ciH = NA_real_,
        npv = NA_real_, npv_ciL = NA_real_, npv_ciH = NA_real_,
        lr_pos = NA_real_, lr_neg = NA_real_,
        n_excluded = as.integer(n_excluded)
      ))
    }
    
    tp <- sum(n_used_df[[test]] == pos_label & n_used_df[[ref]] == pos_label)
    fp <- sum(n_used_df[[test]] == pos_label & n_used_df[[ref]] == neg_label)
    fn <- sum(n_used_df[[test]] == neg_label & n_used_df[[ref]] == pos_label)
    tn <- sum(n_used_df[[test]] == neg_label & n_used_df[[ref]] == neg_label)
    total <- tp + fp + fn + tn
    
    n_excluded <- n_used - total
    
    sens <- if ((tp + fn) > 0) tp / (tp + fn) else NA_real_
    spec <- if ((tn + fp) > 0) tn / (tn + fp) else NA_real_
    
    ci_s   <- ci_binom(tp, tp + fn); sens_l <- ci_s[1]; sens_u <- ci_s[2]
    ci_p   <- ci_binom(tn, tn + fp); spec_l <- ci_p[1]; spec_u <- ci_p[2]
    
    prev <- if (total > 0) (tp + fn) / total else NA_real_
    
    ppv_den <- tp + fp
    npv_den <- tn + fn
    ppv <- if (ppv_den > 0) tp / ppv_den else NA_real_
    npv <- if (npv_den > 0) tn / npv_den else NA_real_
    ci_ppv <- ci_binom(tp, ppv_den); ppv_l <- ci_ppv[1]; ppv_u <- ci_ppv[2]
    ci_npv <- ci_binom(tn, npv_den); npv_l <- ci_npv[1]; npv_u <- ci_npv[2]
    
    lr_pos <- if (!is.na(sens) && !is.na(spec) && (1 - spec) > 0) sens / (1 - spec) else Inf
    if (is.infinite(lr_pos) && (is.na(sens) || is.na(spec))) lr_pos <- NA_real_
    lr_neg <- if (!is.na(sens) && !is.na(spec) && spec > 0) (1 - sens) / spec else Inf
    if (is.infinite(lr_neg) && (is.na(sens) || is.na(spec))) lr_neg <- NA_real_
    
    tibble::tibble(
      test = test, reference = ref,
      tp = as.integer(tp), fp = as.integer(fp), tn = as.integer(tn), fn = as.integer(fn),
      total = as.integer(total),
      sensitivity = sens, sen_ciL = sens_l, sen_ciH = sens_u,
      specificity = spec,  spec_ciL = spec_l, spec_ciH = spec_u,
      prevalence  = prev,
      ppv = ppv, ppv_ciL = ppv_l, ppv_ciH = ppv_u,
      npv = npv, npv_ciL = npv_l, npv_ciH = npv_u,
      lr_pos = lr_pos, lr_neg = lr_neg,
      n_excluded = as.integer(n_excluded)
    )
  }
  
  compute_for_group <- function(df) {
    tidyr::expand_grid(test = tests, reference = reference_standards) %>%
      purrr::pmap_dfr(~ compute_metrics_for_pair(df, ..1, ..2))
  }
  
  if (!is.null(grouping_vars) && length(grouping_vars) > 0) {
    grouped <- data %>%
      dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(grouping_vars)), .drop = FALSE) %>%
      dplyr::group_modify(~ compute_for_group(.x)) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
    
    overall <- compute_for_group(data) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(!!!setNames(rep(list("Overall"), length(grouping_vars)), grouping_vars)) %>%
      dplyr::relocate(dplyr::all_of(grouping_vars), .before = 1)
    
    res <- dplyr::bind_rows(overall, grouped)
  } else {
    res <- compute_for_group(data)
  }
  
  if (compact) {
    res <- dplyr::select(res, -dplyr::any_of(c(
      "prevalence","ppv","ppv_ciL","ppv_ciH","npv","npv_ciL","npv_ciH","lr_pos","lr_neg","n_excluded"
    )))
  }
  
  
  rate_cols <- c("sensitivity","sen_ciL","sen_ciH",
                 "specificity","spec_ciL","spec_ciH",
                 "prevalence",
                 "ppv","ppv_ciL","ppv_ciH",
                 "npv","npv_ciL","npv_ciH",
                 "lr_pos","lr_neg")
  rate_cols <- intersect(rate_cols, names(res))
  
  res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(rate_cols),
                    ~ ifelse(!is.na(.) & is.finite(.) & . < 1, round(., digits), .))
    )
}
```


```{r for efficiency table}
eval_px <- c("pooling", "xpert")
ref_culture <- c("culture")

exp <- calculate_performance(data              = master,
                           tests             = c("pooling"),
                           reference_standards = c("culture"),
                           grouping_vars     = c("poolsize")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(poolsize)) %>% 
  select(1:3,9,12)

exi <- calculate_performance(data              = master,
                            tests             = c("xpert"),
                            reference_standards = c("culture"),
                            grouping_vars     = NULL) %>% 
  select(1,2,8,11)

eff_sen <- bind_rows(exp,exi)

saveRDS(eff_sen, here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","efficiency_sen_spec.rds"))
```


```{r performance tables}
# =========================
# 1) Performance vs CULTURE (masterH + master)
# =========================
eval_px     <- c("pooling", "xpert")
ref_culture <- "culture"
timestamp   <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
out_dir     <- here("Outputs","Performance")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

grp_specs <- list(
  Performance             = NULL,
  Country                 = "Country_Name",
  Setting                 = "settingACF",
  HIV                     = "hiv_status_short",
  PoolSize                = "poolsize",
  PoolSizeCountry         = c("Country_Name","poolsize"),
  PoolSizeCountrySetting  = c("Country_Name","poolsize","settingACF")
)

perf_bundle_culture <- function(dat) {
  core <- imap(grp_specs, ~ calculate_performance(
    data                = dat,
    tests               = eval_px,
    reference_standards = ref_culture,
    grouping_vars       = .x,
    compact = TRUE
  ))
  # only amongst culture-positive
  mtbc <- calculate_performance(
    data                = dat %>%filter(culture == "pos"),
    tests               = eval_px, #c("pooling"),
    reference_standards = ref_culture,
    grouping_vars       = "mtb_grade"
  ) %>%
    select(mtb_grade, test, reference, tp, fp, tn, fn, total, sensitivity, sen_ciL, sen_ciH)
  append(core, list(MTBgrade = mtbc))
}

# ---- Harmonized data = masterH ----
tabs_culture_H <- perf_bundle_culture(masterH)


# ---- master ----
tabs_culture <- perf_bundle_culture(master)

```

```{r stacked df for forest plot - culture}
rename_to_characteristic <- function(df) {
  gcol <- intersect(names(df), c("Country_Name","settingACF","hiv_status_short","poolsize","mtb_grade"))
  if (length(gcol) == 1) dplyr::rename(df, Characteristic = dplyr::all_of(gcol)) else df
}

forest_culture_H <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  Country  = tabs_culture_H$Country  %>% rename_to_characteristic(),
  "Pool Size" = tabs_culture_H$PoolSize %>% rename_to_characteristic()  %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  Setting  = tabs_culture_H$Setting  %>% rename_to_characteristic()  %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  HIV      = tabs_culture_H$HIV      %>% rename_to_characteristic()  %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  "MTB grade" = tabs_culture_H$MTBgrade   %>% rename_to_characteristic()  %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  .id = "Subgroup"
) %>% dplyr::relocate(Subgroup, Characteristic, .before = 1)

forest_culture_H <- forest_culture_H %>% {
  idx <- head(which(.$Subgroup == "Country" & tolower(.$Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")), 2)
  dplyr::mutate(.,
    Subgroup = replace(Subgroup, idx, "Overall"),
    Characteristic = replace(Characteristic, idx, "Overall")
  )
}

saveRDS(forest_culture_H, here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","forest_culture_stacked.rds"))
```


```{r performance PPA tables}
# =========================
# 2) PPA vs XPERT (master)
# For PPA, we don't need harmonized
# =========================
eval_p    <- "pooling"
ref_xpert <- "xpert"
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
out_dir   <- here("Outputs","Performance")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

grp_specs <- list(
  Performance             = NULL,
  Country                 = "Country_Name",
  Setting                 = "settingACF",
  HIV                     = "hiv_status_short",
  PoolSize                = "poolsize",
  PoolSizeCountry         = c("Country_Name","poolsize"),
  PoolSizeCountrySetting  = c("Country_Name","poolsize","settingACF")
)

ppa_bundle <- function(dat) {
  core <- imap(grp_specs, ~ calculate_performance(
    data                = dat,
    tests               = eval_p,
    reference_standards = ref_xpert,
    grouping_vars       = .x,
    compact = TRUE
  ))
  mtb <- calculate_performance(
    data                = dat,
    tests               = eval_p,
    reference_standards = ref_xpert,
    grouping_vars       = "mtb_grade"
  ) %>%
    select(mtb_grade, test, reference, tp, fp, tn, fn, total, sensitivity, sen_ciL, sen_ciH)
  append(core, list(MTBgrade = mtb))
}

# ---- master ----
tabs_ppa <- ppa_bundle(master)
```

```{r stacked df for forest plot PPA}
rename_to_characteristic <- function(df) {
  gcol <- intersect(names(df), c("Country_Name","settingACF","hiv_status_short","poolsize","mtb_grade"))
  if (length(gcol) == 1) dplyr::rename(df, Characteristic = dplyr::all_of(gcol)) else df
}

# ---- PPA forest stack (incl. MTBgrade) ----
forest_ppa <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  Country     = tabs_ppa$Country    %>% rename_to_characteristic(),
  "Pool Size" = tabs_ppa$PoolSize   %>% rename_to_characteristic() %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  Setting     = tabs_ppa$Setting    %>% rename_to_characteristic() %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  HIV         = tabs_ppa$HIV        %>% rename_to_characteristic() %>% dplyr::filter(!tolower(Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")),
  "MTB grade" = tabs_ppa$MTBgrade   %>% rename_to_characteristic(),
  .id = "Subgroup"
) %>% dplyr::relocate(Subgroup, Characteristic, .before = 1)

forest_ppa <- forest_ppa %>% {
  idx <- head(which(.$Subgroup == "Country" & tolower(.$Characteristic) %in% c("overall","all")), 2)
  dplyr::mutate(.,
    Subgroup       = replace(Subgroup, idx, "Overall"),
    Characteristic = replace(Characteristic, idx, "Overall")
  )
} %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Characteristic))

saveRDS(forest_ppa, here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","forest_ppa_stacked.rds"))
```

```{r export analysis appendix}
# These are tables to be put in appendix.

# 2. tabs_culture_H$PoolSizeCountry + 3. tabs_culture_H$PoolSizeCountrySetting
export(
  tabs_culture_H,
  here(out_dir, sprintf("S4A_pooling_performance_harmonized_%s.xlsx", timestamp)),
  overwrite = TRUE
)

# 1. Non-harmonized = built with master
export(
  tabs_culture,
  here(out_dir, sprintf("S4A_pooling_performance_%s.xlsx", timestamp)),
  overwrite = TRUE
)

# PPA
export(
  tabs_ppa,
  here(out_dir, sprintf("S4A_pooling_ppa_%s.xlsx", timestamp)),
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```


```{r formatted appendix table}
# =========================
# 1) For Appendix: Performance vs CULTURE (masterH + master)
# =========================
strip_appendix_cols <- function(x) x %>% select(-any_of(c("lr_pos","lr_neg","n_excluded")))

eval_px     <- c("pooling", "xpert")
ref_culture <- "culture"
timestamp   <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
out_dir     <- here("Outputs","Performance","Appendix table")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

grp_specs <- list(
  Performance             = NULL,
  Country                 = "Country_Name",
  Setting                 = "settingACF",
  HIV                     = "hiv_status_short",
  PoolSize                = "poolsize",
  PoolSizeCountry         = c("Country_Name","poolsize"),
  PoolSizeCountrySetting  = c("Country_Name","poolsize","settingACF")
)

perf_bundle_culture2 <- function(dat) {
  core <- imap(grp_specs, ~ calculate_performance(
    data                = dat,
    tests               = eval_px,
    reference_standards = ref_culture,
    grouping_vars       = .x,
    compact = FALSE
  ))
  core <- map(core, strip_appendix_cols)
  
  # only amongst culture-positive
  mtbc <- calculate_performance(
    data                = dat %>%filter(culture == "pos"),
    tests               = eval_px, #c("pooling"),
    reference_standards = ref_culture,
    grouping_vars       = "mtb_grade",
    compact             = FALSE
  ) %>%
    select(mtb_grade, test, reference, tp, fp, tn, fn, total, sensitivity, sen_ciL, sen_ciH)
  mtbc <- strip_appendix_cols(mtbc)
  append(core, list(MTBgrade = mtbc))
}

# ---- Harmonized data = masterH ----
app_culture_H <- perf_bundle_culture2(masterH)

# ---- master ----
app_culture <- perf_bundle_culture2(master)

export(
  app_culture_H,
  file.path(out_dir, sprintf("Appendix_pooling_performance_harmonized_%s.xlsx", timestamp)),
  overwrite = TRUE
)

export(
  app_culture,
  file.path(out_dir, sprintf("Appendix_pooling_performance_%s.xlsx", timestamp)),
  overwrite = TRUE)


```

```{r formatted appendix table PPA}
# =========================
# Appendix
# 2) PPA vs XPERT (master)
# =========================
eval_p    <- "pooling"
ref_xpert <- "xpert"
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")
out_dir     <- here("Outputs","Performance","Appendix table")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

grp_specs <- list(
  Performance             = NULL,
  Country                 = "Country_Name",
  Setting                 = "settingACF",
  HIV                     = "hiv_status_short",
  PoolSize                = "poolsize",
  PoolSizeCountry         = c("Country_Name","poolsize"),
  PoolSizeCountrySetting  = c("Country_Name","poolsize","settingACF")
)

ppa_bundle2 <- function(dat) {
  core <- imap(grp_specs, ~ calculate_performance(
    data                = dat,
    tests               = eval_p,
    reference_standards = ref_xpert,
    grouping_vars       = .x,
    compact = FALSE
  ))
  core <- map(core, strip_appendix_cols)
  mtb <- calculate_performance(
    data                = dat,
    tests               = eval_p,
    reference_standards = ref_xpert,
    grouping_vars       = "mtb_grade"
  ) %>%
  select(mtb_grade, test, reference, tp, fp, tn, fn, total, sensitivity, sen_ciL, sen_ciH)
  mtb  <- strip_appendix_cols(mtb)
  append(core, list(MTBgrade = mtb))
}

# ---- master ----
app_ppa <- ppa_bundle2(master)

export(
  app_ppa,
  file.path(out_dir, sprintf("Appedix_pooling_ppa_%s.xlsx", timestamp)),
  overwrite = TRUE)
```
